# David Motorcycles (דוד אופנועים) — Denimotoparts

> Boutique motorcycle & scooter gear shop in Israel, run by David. Sells
> helmets, intercoms, jackets, gloves, body armor, locks & security, storage
> boxes, covers, chains and accessories — adventure, off-road and street riding
> gear, at the best prices in Israel. Two physical shops: Moshia 36, Tel Aviv,
> and Dror 2, Tzur Hadassah. Ordering is by WhatsApp or phone (+972-54-776-1717);
> no online checkout. Also offers repairs, towing, trailer rental, battery
> replacement, tyre changes and brake service. Hours 11:00–20:00.
> Languages: Hebrew (primary), English, Russian.

## Main pages
- [Home](https://orengozlan.github.io/david_motorcycle/he/): brand overview and featured gear
- [Products](https://orengozlan.github.io/david_motorcycle/he/products/): full catalog by category
- [About](https://orengozlan.github.io/david_motorcycle/he/about/): who we are and services
- [FAQ](https://orengozlan.github.io/david_motorcycle/he/faq/): common buyer questions answered
- [Contact](https://orengozlan.github.io/david_motorcycle/he/contact/): addresses, phone, WhatsApp, hours

## Product categories
- [Helmets / קסדות](https://orengozlan.github.io/david_motorcycle/he/categories/helmets/)
- [Jackets / מעילים](https://orengozlan.github.io/david_motorcycle/he/categories/jackets/)
- [Intercoms / אינטרקום ותקשורת](https://orengozlan.github.io/david_motorcycle/he/categories/intercoms/)
- [Covers / כיסויים](https://orengozlan.github.io/david_motorcycle/he/categories/covers/)
- [Accessories / אביזרים](https://orengozlan.github.io/david_motorcycle/he/categories/chains-accessories/)
